reviewMetadata.reviewerPerspective: ChatGPT/GPT-4 users (general consumers, business users, productivity focus)

documentationClarity.notes: Good structure and visual organization, but inconsistencies between README.md and SKILL.md create confusion

installationExperience.notes: Unclear manual installation instructions, placeholder URLs, no package manager support, script duplication confusion

configuration.notes: Flexible options (env var, password manager, Warden integration), but could be simpler for non-technical users

security.notes: Good core practices (no key storage, env var support), but lacks depth in documentation and best practices

errorHandling.notes: Basic errors covered, but inconsistent between scripts, missing many common scenarios, no debug mode

troubleshooting.notes: Only 3 error scenarios documented, needs significant expansion with common issues

integrationCapabilities.notes: JSON mode is excellent for automation, Warden integration good, but needs more examples and templates

featureCompleteness.notes: Core features present and functional, missing search, stats, bulk operations, and quality-of-life improvements

overallScore.assessment: Solid foundation, needs polish for mainstream users

criticalIssues: No step-by-step API key setup guide
Two different scripts with different implementations

immediate: Unify documentation between README.md and SKILL.md
Clarify installation instructions with actual URLs and PATH setup
Add detailed API key setup walkthrough
longTerm: Implement interactive mode for non-CLI users

wellSuitedFor: Privacy-conscious users who understand email aliasing
notIdealFor: Non-technical business users without CLI experience
Users expecting GUI or guided setup
Quick one-off alias creation (web interface faster)
Users wanting email client integration out-of-the-box

topPriorities: P0-03: Add API key walkthrough (S effort)
